subject: Cedar & Slate real-time launch confirmation
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Elise,

Real-time payment reconciliation and payment token handling are included before launch. We can also commit to event-triggered inventory updates before June 10 so Store 014 does not block readiness.

Best,
Mira

intendedClaims.text: Real-time payment reconciliation and payment token handling are included before launch.
We can also commit to event-triggered inventory updates before June 10.
